entry.title: FLUX VTO: Virtual Try-On at scale
entry.summary: FLUX Virtual Try-On allows users to seem themselves in outfits before they buy with high accuracy and garment consistency. Gives you sub‑4 second generations across thousands of products at low cost and low latency.

entry.title: FLUX Erase: Remove anything, leave no trace
entry.summary: FLUX Erase removes whatever you mask — object, shadow, reflection, and all — and reconstructs the scene behind it without touching the rest of the image.

entry.title: FLUX Outpainting: Extend any image, in any direction
entry.summary: FLUX Outpainting extends images beyond their original frame in any direction, preserving lighting, texture, and composition without visible seams.

entry.title: How Our Forward Deployed Engineers Work with Customers
entry.summary: Our engineers help partners turn FLUX into real systems: prompts, pipelines, fine-tunes, and infra tuned for real-world use cases.

entry.title: Capable, Open, and Safe: Combating AI Misuse
entry.summary: Today, Black Forest Labs’ FLUX models are among the most popular AI models for visual generation. We are excited to share early results that help validate our efforts to mitigate emerging risks.

entry.title: FLUX.2 [klein]: Towards Interactive Visual Intelligence
entry.summary: Introducing FLUX.2 [klein], our fastest image models. Unified generation and editing in under a second, on hardware you already own. Apache 2.0 on 4B.

entry.title: Laying the Foundations for Visual Intelligence—Our $300M Series B
entry.summary: Today, we're excited to announce our Series B of $300M at a $3.25B post-money valuation.

entry.title: FLUX.2: Frontier Visual Intelligence
entry.summary: Today, we release FLUX.2, our most capable model to date.

entry.title: FLUX.1 Kontext now in Adobe Photoshop: Powering Every Pixel
entry.summary: By pairing Photoshop’s professional editing environment with FLUX.1 Kontext [Pro]’s accuracy and unmatched speed, creators everywhere gain the freedom to push imagination further.

entry.title: OpenArt transforms video storytelling with FLUX.1 Kontext: Making video creation accessible beyond traditional creators
entry.summary: OpenArt transformed video storytelling with FLUX.1 Kontext integration, enabling creators who couldn't access video production before to create professional-quality content.

entry.title: Burda transforms Comic Creation with Black Forest Labs' FLUX.1 Models
entry.summary: Burda - a major publisher in the DACH region - transformed their comic creation process for the LissyPony series, one of the most recognized children’s magazines in central Europe.

entry.title: FLUX Models Launch on Azure AI Foundry for Enterprise-Ready Image Generation
entry.summary: Starting today, Black Forest Labs’ flagship models are available directly from Microsoft on Azure AI Foundry.

entry.title: FLUX.1 Krea [dev]: An ‘Opinionated’ Text-to-Image Model
entry.summary: The BFL model garden just got an exciting update: We are proud to release FLUX.1 Krea [dev], developed in collaboration with Krea AI.

entry.title: FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] - Open Weights for Image Editing
entry.summary: Up until today, all capable generative image editing models were only available as proprietary tools.

entry.title: Introducing FLUX.1 Kontext and the BFL Playground
entry.summary: Today, we are excited to release FLUX.1 Kontext, a suite of generative flow matching models that allows you to generate and edit images.

entry.title: Announcing the FLUX Pro Finetuning API
entry.summary: Black Forest Labs is excited to announce the launch of the FLUX Pro Finetuning API, bringing unprecedented customization capabilities to our flagship FLUX Pro model line.

entry.title: Bringing Lightning-Fast FLUX Performance to More Creators in Collaboration with NVIDIA
entry.summary: Our new collaboration with NVIDIA marks a significant leap forward in making our FLUX models more universally accessible and efficient.

entry.title: Introducing FLUX1.1 [pro] Ultra and Raw Modes
entry.summary: Today, we are adding new high-resolution capabilities to FLUX1.1 [pro], extending its functionality to support 4x higher image resolutions (up to 4MP) while maintaining an impressive generation time of only 10 seconds per sample.

entry.title: Introducing FLUX.1 Tools
entry.summary: Today, we are excited to release FLUX.1 Tools, a suite of models designed to add control and steerability to our base text-to-image model FLUX.1

entry.title: Announcing FLUX1.1 [pro] and the BFL API
entry.summary: Today, we release FLUX1.1 [pro], our most advanced and efficient model yet, alongside the general availability of the beta BFL API. This release marks a significant step forward in our mission to empower creators, developers, and enterprises with scalable, state-of-the-art generative technology.

entry.title: Announcing Black Forest Labs
entry.summary: Today, we are excited to announce the launch of Black Forest Labs.
